description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named LibreSSL CI that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master affecting specific files. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy for different LibreSSL versions. For each version, check out the code, install CMake, gtest, and the specific LibreSSL version, then configure and run CMake, make, and tests. Generate Shields badges based on test success and publish them to a GitHub Pages branch.
